meta.title: Return to BC Road Trip
meta.subtitle: Lake Forest to Victoria, BC via Highway 1, Santa Cruz, Southern Oregon, and Port Townsend.
meta.statusNote: Confirmed hotels and dinner reservations now appear directly on their matching route cards; separate lists show planning options only.

locked: July 30: The Butler Hotel in San Luis Obispo
San Luis Obispo dinner: Novo Restaurant & Lounge
July 31-Aug 2: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages in Pacific Grove
Aug 2-3: Seaway Inn in Santa Cruz
Aug 4-5: Wine Country Inn in Jacksonville
Aug 5-9: Residence Inn Portland Airport at Cascade Station

route.label: Ayres Suites Lake Forest
route.mapsQuery: Ayres Suites Lake Forest, Lake Forest, CA
route.headline: 1 booked local hotel night in Lake Forest
route.note: Booked local overnight before leaving Orange County. Use Lake Forest as the July 29 route start.

route.label: Kimpton Canary Santa Barbara
route.mapsQuery: Kimpton Canary Santa Barbara, Santa Barbara, CA
route.headline: 1 locked night in Santa Barbara
route.note: Locked Santa Barbara stay. Pet-friendly hotel with no pet fee. Dinner is locked at The Lark at 6:00 PM.

route.label: The Butler Hotel, San Luis Obispo
route.mapsQuery: The Butler Hotel, San Luis Obispo, CA
route.headline: 1 locked night in San Luis Obispo
route.note: Locked SLO overnight at The Butler Hotel before the Big Sur / Monterey leg. Dinner is locked at Novo Restaurant & Lounge.

route.label: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages, Pacific Grove
route.mapsQuery: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages, 1100 Lighthouse Ave, Pacific Grove, CA 93950
route.headline: 2 locked nights in Pacific Grove
route.note: Locked Monterey-area stay at Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages in Pacific Grove after the Big Sur leg.

route.label: Seaway Inn, Santa Cruz
route.mapsQuery: Seaway Inn, 176 West Cliff Drive, Santa Cruz, CA 95060
route.headline: 1 locked night in Santa Cruz
route.note: Locked beachfront stay at Seaway Inn. Check in Aug 2 and check out Aug 3.

route.label: Thunderbird Lodge, Redding
route.mapsQuery: Thunderbird Lodge, 1350 Pine Street, Redding, CA 96001
route.headline: 1 locked night in Redding
route.note: Locked downtown Redding stay at Thunderbird Lodge. Check in starts at 3:00 PM Aug 3; check out before 11:00 AM Aug 4.

route.label: Wine Country Inn, Jacksonville
route.mapsQuery: Wine Country Inn, 830 N. 5th St., Jacksonville, OR 97530
route.headline: 1 locked night in Jacksonville
route.note: Locked Jacksonville stay at Wine Country Inn before continuing north to Portland. Cancel at least 24 hours before arrival to avoid penalty fees.

route.label: Residence Inn Portland Airport at Cascade Station
route.mapsQuery: Residence Inn by Marriott Portland Airport at Cascade Station, 9301 Northeast Cascades Parkway, Portland, OR 97220
route.overnight: Residence Inn Portland Airport at Cascade Station
route.headline: 4 locked nights in Portland
route.note: Locked four-night Portland base near Cascade Station and SE 109th. Check in Aug 5 at 4:00 PM; check out Aug 9.
route.hotelName: Residence Inn by Marriott Portland Airport at Cascade Station

route.label: Seattle / Northgate
route.headline: 2 nights in Seattle / Northgate
route.note: Two-night Seattle stay in the Northgate area. Hotel not yet locked.

route.label: Port Townsend
route.overnight: At least one night in Port Townsend
route.headline: At least 1 night in Port Townsend
route.note: Final US-side buffer night before driving to the Port Angeles-Victoria ferry. Hotel not yet locked.

route.label: Port Angeles Ferry Terminal
route.mapsQuery: Port Angeles Ferry Terminal, Port Angeles, WA
route.drive: Leave Port Townsend by 9:45 AM; target terminal arrival 11:00-11:15 AM
route.headline: Ferry staging: Port Townsend to Port Angeles
route.note: Target the 12:45 PM Port Angeles departure if available. Reserve once date is locked.

route.label: Victoria, BC
route.date: Wed Aug 12 target; by Sat Aug 15 latest
route.headline: Ferry leg: Port Angeles to Victoria
route.note: Route targets Victoria on Aug 12 if the ferry and lodging sequence stay intact.

hotels.name: Ayres Suites Lake Forest
hotels.dog: Confirm room rules for the dog before arrival.
hotels.why: Local reset night on July 28 before leaving Orange County.

hotels.name: Kimpton Canary Santa Barbara
hotels.dog: Locked. Kimpton pet policy is the reason this beat Hotel Californian.
hotels.parking: Confirm valet / parking setup and best unloading plan before arrival.
hotels.why: Downtown Santa Barbara stay with no painful one-night pet fee.

hotels.name: The Butler Hotel
hotels.dog: Confirm any pet-room details from the booking confirmation.
hotels.parking: Confirm parking / unloading plan from the reservation details.
hotels.why: Locked SLO overnight before the Big Sur / Monterey leg.

hotels.name: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages
hotels.dog: Confirm dog-room details, pet fees, and room rules before arrival.
hotels.parking: Confirm parking / unloading plan with the front desk.
hotels.why: Locked two-night Monterey-area base in Pacific Grove.

hotels.name: Seaway Inn
hotels.address: 176 West Cliff Drive, Santa Cruz, CA 95060
hotels.dog: Dogs are allowed for $50 per dog per night, up to 2 dogs and 50 lbs each; dogs cannot be left unattended.
hotels.parking: Self-parking is $25 per night for one vehicle and is first-come, first-served.
hotels.why: Locked beachfront Santa Cruz overnight near the Boardwalk and Municipal Wharf.

hotels.name: Thunderbird Lodge
hotels.dog: Dog-friendly: $25 per dog per night, maximum 2 dogs and 40 lbs each; declare the dog at check-in.
hotels.parking: Guest parking is first-come, first-served. Register the vehicle at the front desk and display the issued permit.
hotels.why: Locked downtown Redding overnight before continuing to Southern Oregon.

hotels.name: Wine Country Inn
hotels.dog: Dedicated first-floor dog-friendly rooms; $25 per dog per night; dogs cannot be left unattended.
hotels.why: Cancel at least 24 hours before arrival to avoid penalty fees.

hotels.name: Residence Inn by Marriott Portland Airport at Cascade Station
hotels.dog: Confirm the dog is noted on the reservation and verify the total pet fee before arrival.
hotels.parking: Confirm overnight parking and the easiest unloading entrance before arrival.
hotels.why: Locked four-night Portland base near Cascade Station and SE 109th.

dinners.name: Brü Grill & Market
dinners.dog: Call to confirm patio dog seating.
dinners.why: Easy local dinner near the July 28 hotel night.

dinners.name: The Lark
dinners.dog: Reservation locked. Reconfirm dog/patio logistics directly if anything changes.
dinners.why: Locked nice dinner after checking into Kimpton Canary.

dinners.name: Convivo
dinners.dog: Call to confirm dog-friendly patio seating.
dinners.why: Backup only if The Lark plan changes.

dinners.name: Novo Restaurant & Lounge
dinners.dog: Dinner locked. Request or confirm creekside/outdoor patio with dog if needed.
dinners.why: Locked dinner for the San Luis Obispo night at The Butler Hotel.

dinners.name: Laili Restaurant
dinners.dog: Call to confirm patio dog seating.
dinners.why: Good nicer dinner after the short Monterey to Santa Cruz leg.

dinners.name: Mosaic Restaurant
dinners.dog: Call to confirm dog-friendly patio seating.

dinners.name: Bella Union Restaurant
dinners.dog: Call to confirm patio dog seating.
dinners.why: Good fit for the Jacksonville stop.

dinners.name: Tin Shed Garden Cafe
dinners.dog: Confirm dinner hours and patio dog seating.
dinners.why: One of Portland’s easiest dog-friendly food picks.

dinners.name: Barking Dog Alehouse
dinners.dog: Call to confirm patio dog seating.
dinners.why: Strong North Seattle fit when staying around Northgate.

dinners.name: Sirens Pub
dinners.dog: Call to confirm deck / patio dog seating.
dinners.why: Easy Port Townsend dinner with ferry-buffer-night energy.
